free_text: Total cross sections for C, Na, 98Mo and 235U
Time of flight, 1.4 n sec resolution.
No information about source of uncertainty
SD:Updated to new date formats,lower case.
Thick sample of enriched Mo-98, 0.1457 atoms/b.
Some self-screening in the region below 1 MeV, where
separate resonances can be seen. The cross section is
lower in this region by 0.2 to 0.4 b than other data,
but in agreement at higher energies.
